name: NavigationMenu
description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

api.name: NavigationMenu
api.description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The NavigationMenuList (and typically a NavigationMenuViewport) that make up the menu.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Accessible name for the <nav> landmark. Defaults to "Main".

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Controlled value of the currently-open item. Bind with @bind-Value/ValueChanged. The value matches the open Value (or its auto id when none is set); null means no submenu is open. Leave unset for uncontrolled use.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

parameters.name: DefaultValue
parameters.description: Initial open item for uncontrolled use (ignored once Value is bound). null (default) opens nothing.

parameters.name: DelayDuration
parameters.description: Grace window in milliseconds before a hovered submenu closes after the pointer leaves it. Radix's forgiveness delay: moving between adjacent triggers, or briefly slipping off the panel, does not immediately dismiss. Defaults to 150ms.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

records.name: NavigationMenuContext
records.signature: NavigationMenuContext(string? ActiveItemId, EventCallback<string?> SetActiveItemId, NavigationMenu Owner, int CloseDelayMs)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
Getting Started
Introduction Learn the basics of building with Lumeo. Installation Add Lumeo to your Blazor project.
Components
Button Trigger actions or navigation events.
Documentation

examples.title: Simple Links
examples.code:
<NavigationMenu>
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Home</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">About</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Blog</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Contact</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

examples.title: With Badge
examples.code:
<NavigationMenu>
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>
                <NavigationMenuLink Href="#">
                    <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Analytics</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Badge>New</Badge>
                    </Flex>
                </NavigationMenuLink>
                <NavigationMenuLink Href="#">
                    <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">API</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">Beta</Badge>
                    </Flex>
                </NavigationMenuLink>
            </NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

examples.title: Controlled (open a panel programmatically)
examples.code:
<Flex Gap="2">
    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" OnClick="@(() => _navValue = "products")">Open Products</Button>
    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" OnClick="@(() => _navValue = null)">Close</Button>
</Flex>
<NavigationMenu @bind-Value="_navValue" DelayDuration="100">
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem Value="products">
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>...</NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem Value="resources">
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Resources</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>...</NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

@code {
    private string? _navValue;
}

mdSummary:
# NavigationMenu

Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/navigation-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| NavigationMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The NavigationMenuList (and typically a NavigationMenuViewport) that make up the menu. |
| NavigationMenu | Label | `string` | `"Main"` | Accessible name for the \<nav\> landmark. Defaults to "Main". |
| NavigationMenu | Value | `string?` | `` | Controlled value of the currently-open item. Bind with @bind-Value/ValueChanged. The value matches the open Value (or its auto id when none is set); null means no submenu is open. Leave unset for uncontrolled use. |
| NavigationMenu | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed. |
| NavigationMenu | DefaultValue | `string?` | `` | Initial open item for uncontrolled use (ignored once Value is bound). null (default) opens nothing. |
| NavigationMenu | DelayDuration | `int` | `150` | Grace window in milliseconds before a hovered submenu closes after the pointer leaves it. Radix's forgiveness delay: moving between adjacent triggers, or briefly slipping off the panel, does not immediately dismiss. Defaults to 150ms. |
| NavigationMenu | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav element. |
| NavigationMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element. |
| NavigationMenuContent | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | ItemContext | `NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The submenu panel content shown when the owning NavigationMenuItem is open. |
| NavigationMenuContent | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root panel element. |
| NavigationMenuContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root panel element. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | Open | `bool` | `false` | Whether the mobile menu this hamburger controls is open. Pair with OpenChanged for two-way binding. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Raised when the button is clicked and toggles Open. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | IsOpen | `bool` | `false` | Obsolete alias for Open. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Obsolete alias for OpenChanged. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button element. |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button element. |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Reserved for a custom indicator visual; currently unused (the default arrow caret always renders). |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element. |
| NavigationMenuItem | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Typically a NavigationMenuTrigger plus NavigationMenuContent, or a plain NavigationMenuLink for a leaf item. |
| NavigationMenuItem | Value | `string?` | `` | Stable identity for this item, used by the controlled Value binding to say which item is open. When unset an auto id is used, so uncontrolled menus keep working unchanged. |
| NavigationMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root li element. |
| NavigationMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root li element. |
| NavigationMenuLink | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | Href | `string?` | `` | The link's navigation target. |
| NavigationMenuLink | IsActive | `bool` | `false` | When true, the link is the user's current location and is rendered with aria-current="page". Lets screen-reader users identify the active item in a nav landmark. |
| NavigationMenuLink | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The link's content. |
| NavigationMenuLink | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root a element. |
| NavigationMenuLink | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root a element. |
| NavigationMenuList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The NavigationMenuItem elements that make up the top-level menu. |
| NavigationMenuList | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root ul element. |
| NavigationMenuList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root ul element. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The menu content rendered inside the slide-out sheet. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | Open | `bool` | `false` | Whether the mobile menu sheet is open. Pair with OpenChanged for two-way binding. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Raised when the sheet's open state changes (e.g. dismissed by outside click or Escape). |
| NavigationMenuMobile | IsOpen | `bool` | `false` | Obsolete alias for Open. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Obsolete alias for OpenChanged. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the sheet content panel. |
| NavigationMenuMobile | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the inner content wrapper. |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | ItemContext | `NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator. |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button element. |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button element. |
| NavigationMenuViewport | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuViewport | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional content rendered inside the viewport frame while any menu item is open. |
| NavigationMenuViewport | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer positioning wrapper. |
| NavigationMenuViewport | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the outer positioning wrapper. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenu) — The NavigationMenuList (and typically a NavigationMenuViewport) that make up the menu.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuContent) — The submenu panel content shown when the owning NavigationMenuItem is open.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuIndicator) — Reserved for a custom indicator visual; currently unused (the default arrow caret always renders).
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuItem) — Typically a NavigationMenuTrigger plus NavigationMenuContent, or a plain NavigationMenuLink for a leaf item.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuLink) — The link's content.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuList) — The NavigationMenuItem elements that make up the top-level menu.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuMobile) — The menu content rendered inside the slide-out sheet.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuTrigger) — The trigger's label content, rendered before the chevron indicator.
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuViewport) — Optional content rendered inside the viewport frame while any menu item is open.

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

## Sub-components
- `NavigationMenuContent`, `NavigationMenuHamburger`, `NavigationMenuIndicator`, `NavigationMenuItem`, `NavigationMenuLink`, `NavigationMenuList`, `NavigationMenuMobile`, `NavigationMenuTrigger`, `NavigationMenuViewport`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext`)
- `ItemContext` (`NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in NavigationMenuContent.razor
- `ArrowRight` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowRight in NavigationMenuTrigger.razor
- `ArrowLeft` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowLeft in NavigationMenuTrigger.razor
- `Home` — HandleKeyDown handles Home in NavigationMenuTrigger.razor
- `End` — HandleKeyDown handles End in NavigationMenuTrigger.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowDown in NavigationMenuTrigger.razor

## Example
```razor
<NavigationMenu />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenu.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuContent.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuHamburger.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuIndicator.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuItem.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuLink.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuList.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuMobile.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuTrigger.razor`
- `UI/NavigationMenu/NavigationMenuViewport.razor`
